description_long: This object is a triangular piece of bread, resembling a scone or a rustic pastry, with a thick, uneven crust. The surface is mottled with a mix of golden brown and darker baked areas, interspersed with patches of white, likely from a sugar or flour topping. The top is bumpy and irregular, with visible lumps and a slightly glossy finish in some spots, suggesting a glaze or melted sugar. The sides are rough and jagged, with a denser, more compact appearance compared to the top. The overall shape is wedge-like, tapering to a point at one end and broader at the other, with a substantial thickness. There are no visible signs of packaging, branding, or slicing, and the bread appears whole and artisanal.
description: A rustic, triangular piece of bread with a golden-brown, bumpy crust and white patches, resembling a scone or pastry. The surface is rough and uneven, with no visible packaging or branding.
description_view_0: The front view shows the broad, bumpy top with white patches and a thick, uneven crust.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the wedge shape and the rough, jagged edge, with the top surface sloping downward.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the rounded, compact end of the bread, with a more uniform golden-brown color and fewer white patches.
description_view_3: This angled view emphasizes the thickness and the irregular, lumpy texture of the crust, with the point of the wedge visible.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick, uneven, and bumpy, with a rustic appearance. It features irregular patches of white, likely from flour or sugar, and has a rough, artisanal texture with no visible scoring or seeds.
